declarations.description:
A glassmorphic button with spectral gradient interactions.

- **primary**: Spectral gradient background with hover glow.
- **secondary**: Glass surface with spectral border on hover.
- **ghost**: Minimal, text appears on hover.

declarations.description:
A glassmorphic card component with spectral gradient interactions.

- **Focus-visible**: A 2px spectral gradient ring appears on keyboard focus.
- **Hover**: The elevated variant gains a subtle spectral glow.
- **Selected/accent**: A gradient border overlay decorates the card.
declarations.name: SgCard

members.name: variant
members.description:
Card visual variant.
- `elevated`: glass surface with shadow + spectral hover glow (default)
- `outlined`: transparent with visible border + subtle glow on hover
- `ghost`: minimal, no border or bg until hover

members.name: padding
members.description:
Inner padding size.
- `sm`: 12px
- `md`: 20px (default)
- `lg`: 28px

members.name: accent
members.description: When true, renders a 1px spectral gradient border overlay.

members.name: selected
members.description:
When true, renders a thicker spectral gradient border
to indicate the selected/active state.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
Card visual variant.
- `elevated`: glass surface with shadow + spectral hover glow (default)
- `outlined`: transparent with visible border + subtle glow on hover
- `ghost`: minimal, no border or bg until hover

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description:
Inner padding size.
- `sm`: 12px
- `md`: 20px (default)
- `lg`: 28px

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: When true, renders a 1px spectral gradient border overlay.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description:
When true, renders a thicker spectral gradient border
to indicate the selected/active state.
